descriptionHtml:
Bavaria Nautitech 46 Fly for sale 2017 | 4 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

PRIVATE USE - NEVER CHARTERED

If you are searching for a comfortable, versatile cruising catamaran, the Bavaria Nautitech 46 Fly for sale 2017 should be high on your shortlist. Renowned for combining performance and comfort, this vessel is ideal for families or small groups seeking adventure and relaxation on the water. This particular example from 2017 is currently available and is in good condition, cared for by experienced owners and maintained to a reliable standard.

Below, you’ll find a comprehensive list of her specifications and key features:

Specifications and Features

  • Year: 2017
  • Model: Bavaria Nautitech 46 Fly
  • Condition: Good
  • Length Overall: 13.79 metres
  • Beam: 7.54 metres
  • Draft: 1.45 metres
  • Hull Material: GRP (Glass Reinforced Plastic)
  • Steering Wheels: GRP Carbon (flybridge and cockpit)
  • Engines: x2 55 hp Volvo Penta Diesel

Deck and Rigging

  • Lazy bag with jack and cleats
  • Davits and cleats for tender + manual winch
  • Protection cover for helm station
  • Manual lowerable cockpit table (seats up to 10)
  • Teak cockpit table and flexiteek synthetic teak aft platforms and passages
  • Mosquito protection for deck hatches
  • Hybniag Galvanised Delta anchor with 60m chain
  • Electric winch at helm station
  • Remote anchor windlass control with chain counter

Outdoor Living

  • Cushions and backrest for aft cockpit benches
  • Front deck lounge area with foldable three-part cushions converting to mattress + storage
  • Sun net cockpit enclosure (in combination with full enclosure)
  • Exterior mesh screens for saloon windows

Lighting

  • Two LED spotlights under bridgedeck
  • Blue courtesy LED lights in cockpit and aft deck
  • Indirect dimmable LED lighting in aft cabin and saloon

Interior

  • “Comfort” upholstery package in salon
  • Two interior throw cushions
  • Stainless steel rails in saloon and wide cabins
  • Leather clutch bags and storage pockets
  • 12V sockets in each cabin and saloon
  • Electrical seawater pump in galley

Audio & Entertainment

  • Audio Basis Package:
    • 2 speakers in saloon
    • 2 speakers in cockpit
    • 2 speakers on flybridge
    • Bluetooth and USB connectivity

Navigation & Electronics

  • Garmin GHP20 hydraulic autopilot on flybridge
  • Garmin GMI20 display at flybridge helm station and chart table
  • Garmin 300 VHF with AIS receiver at chart table
  • Upgrade: Garmin GPSmap 7412 chart plotter replaces standard 721, installed at both chart table and flybridge

Extras

  • Aluminium foldable gangway (2.50m length)
  • Guest comfort and thoughtful layout for extended stays on board

For sailors and boating enthusiasts considering the Bavaria Nautitech 46 Fly for sale 2017, this yacht presents a well-equipped, maintained solution for cruising in comfort. Arrange a viewing to appreciate her space, features, and reliable condition in person.
